## Quickstart sentinel-7f3a9c

A non-default section name so a TOC that ignores the real heading text
(returning a hard-coded or default anchor) is caught by the read-back.

A deliberately duplicated heading so the anchor disambiguator (`-1` suffix)
is exercised end-to-end, not just in the unit suite.

```bash
# This is a comment, not a heading — the parser must skip fenced code.
echo "## Fake Heading"
```
